payload.description: Based on the existing Q52/53 Limited bus route. 14 miles long from Woodside to the Rockaways. Important north/south transit corridor for Queens. Provides connections to 8 subway lines, 20+ bus routes, and LIRR. DOT and MTA committed to delivering Woodhaven / Cross Bay Blvd (Q52/Q53) SBS.

tool_args.label: Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevard SBS corridor

payload.description: 14 miles long from Woodside to the Rockaways. Important north/south transit corridor for Queens. Based on existing Q52/53 Limited bus route. 30,000+ daily bus riders. Provides connections to 8 subway lines, 20+ bus routes, and LIRR. Vision Zero Priority Corridor between Queens Blvd and 165 Av.
Existing limited bus route on Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevard corridor. Part of the existing Q52/53 Limited service that the SBS corridor is based on.

payload.description: 2017 short-term project includes: Q52/53 SBS launch with improved fare payment and branded service. Street resurfacing. Roadway and pedestrian safety improvements. Bus lanes and transit signal priority. Median bus stops along 1.3 miles of corridor where service roads exist.
